detectors.description:
Reentrancy in MIZUCHI._transfer(address,address,uint256) (MIZUCHI.sol#665-789):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (MIZUCHI.sol#729)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (MIZUCHI.sol#803-815)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (MIZUCHI.sol#735)
		- _marketingAddress.transfer(amount) (MIZUCHI.sol#823)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (MIZUCHI.sol#787)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (MIZUCHI.sol#949)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (MIZUCHI.sol#929)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (MIZUCHI.sol#931)
	MIZUCHI._rOwned (MIZUCHI.sol#335) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- MIZUCHI._takeTeam(uint256) (MIZUCHI.sol#943-951)
	- MIZUCHI._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (MIZUCHI.sol#903-939)
	- MIZUCHI.balanceOf(address) (MIZUCHI.sol#491-495)
	- MIZUCHI.constructor() (MIZUCHI.sol#425-455)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (MIZUCHI.sol#787)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (MIZUCHI.sol#957)
	MIZUCHI._rTotal (MIZUCHI.sol#349) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- MIZUCHI._getCurrentSupply() (MIZUCHI.sol#1099-1109)
	- MIZUCHI._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (MIZUCHI.sol#955-961)
	- MIZUCHI.constructor() (MIZUCHI.sol#425-455)
	- MIZUCHI.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (MIZUCHI.sol#587-609)
detectors.markdown:
Reentrancy in [MIZUCHI._transfer(address,address,uint256)](MIZUCHI.sol#L665-L789):
	External calls:
	- [swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance)](MIZUCHI.sol#L729)
		- [uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp)](MIZUCHI.sol#L803-L815)
	External calls sending eth:
	- [sendETHToFee(address(this).balance)](MIZUCHI.sol#L735)
		- [_marketingAddress.transfer(amount)](MIZUCHI.sol#L823)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- [_tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee)](MIZUCHI.sol#L787)
		- [_rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam)](MIZUCHI.sol#L949)
		- [_rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount)](MIZUCHI.sol#L929)
		- [_rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount)](MIZUCHI.sol#L931)
	[MIZUCHI._rOwned](MIZUCHI.sol#L335) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [MIZUCHI._takeTeam(uint256)](MIZUCHI.sol#L943-L951)
	- [MIZUCHI._transferStandard(address,address,uint256)](MIZUCHI.sol#L903-L939)
	- [MIZUCHI.balanceOf(address)](MIZUCHI.sol#L491-L495)
	- [MIZUCHI.constructor()](MIZUCHI.sol#L425-L455)
	- [_tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee)](MIZUCHI.sol#L787)
		- [_rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee)](MIZUCHI.sol#L957)
	[MIZUCHI._rTotal](MIZUCHI.sol#L349) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- [MIZUCHI._getCurrentSupply()](MIZUCHI.sol#L1099-L1109)
	- [MIZUCHI._reflectFee(uint256,uint256)](MIZUCHI.sol#L955-L961)
	- [MIZUCHI.constructor()](MIZUCHI.sol#L425-L455)
	- [MIZUCHI.tokenFromReflection(uint256)](MIZUCHI.sol#L587-L609)
